posting.sourceTitle: Plumbing and Heating JATC Rochester LU #13
posting.jobTitle: Heating, Ventilation and Air Conditioning Mechanic Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: Plumbing and Heating Joint Apprenticeship and Training Council, Local Union #13
posting.locationSummary: Rochester, NY and Local Union #13 jurisdiction
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online any time or in person on the first Tuesday of each month at Local Union #13 in Rochester. After an online application, you must take the math aptitude test the following month; if you miss it, your application will be discarded and you must reapply and pay the fee again.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: The Plumbing and Heating Joint Apprenticeship and Training Council, Local Union #13, 1850 Mt. Read Blvd., Rochester, NY 14615
posting.applicationHours: Online applications may be completed any time. In-person applications are available the first Tuesday of each month from 9:00 a.m. to 11:00 a.m. and 1:00 p.m. to 3:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.applicationFeeDetails: Applicants must pay a $20 application fee before taking the math test in person at LU #13. The fee may be waived upon request with verifiable proof of financial need.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old at the time of application.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC, with proof presented with transcripts at the time of application.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must have lived for at least one year within the jurisdiction of Local Union #13, including Allegany, Genesee, Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Orleans, Seneca, Steuben, Wayne, or Yates counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid driver's license and reliable transportation to job sites and required classes; apprentices may be required to drive company vehicles.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a physical exam and drug test after selection and before enrollment, at the sponsor's expense, and must submit to random drug testing during the apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old at the time of application.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC.
Proof must be presented with transcripts at the time of application.
Must pass a math exam at the time of application with a score of 70% or higher.
After filling out the online application, the applicant must complete the math aptitude test on the first Tuesday of the following month.
If the applicant does not take the test, the application will be discarded and the applicant must reapply and pay the application fee again.

Must be physically able to do the work of a Heating, Ventilation and Air Conditioning Mechanic, which includes heavy lifting in excess of 80 lbs. on occasion, working in confined spaces, climbing and working at various heights from ladders, lifts, and scaffolds, and working indoors and outdoors in industrial plants, institutions, commercial buildings, and power plants.
Must be legally able to work in the United States.
Must have a valid driver's license.
Apprentices may be required to drive company vehicles.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must be a resident, for at least one year, within the jurisdiction of Local Union #13, including Allegany, Genesee, Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Orleans, Seneca, Steuben, Wayne, or Yates counties.
Must appear for an interview when scheduled.
Must reimburse the JATC $100 for book fees for years 1 through 4 of the apprenticeship.
Proof of minimum age of 18 must be presented after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Proof of transcripts from any other educational programs to be considered must be presented after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Proof of current driver's license must be presented after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Proof of residency within the jurisdiction of Local Union #13 must be presented after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
DD-214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, must be presented if applicable after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must pass a physical exam and drug test after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship, at the expense of the sponsor.
Must submit to random drug testing at any time during the apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, have a high school diploma or equivalency, live in the Local Union #13 jurisdiction for at least one year, pass a math exam, have a valid driver's license, and be able to meet physical and drug-testing requirements.
posting.contactName: Plumbing and Heating Joint Apprenticeship and Training Council, Local Union #13
posting.contactSummary: Contact Local Union #13 at (585) 338-2360 for more information.
